lesson: windows-mcp Click on Gemini Send button still does NOT propagate to React onClick handler in v2.2.3-REBUILT. clipboard+Ctrl+V successfully populates input but neither Shortcut(enter) nor Type(press_enter=true) triggers form submission. Native KeyboardEvent dispatch from Win32 SendInput is not recognized by Gemini's React form handler. Need alternative: CDP/DevTools Protocol (chrome --remote-debugging-port) injecting synthetic React-recognized event, or browser MCP (Claude_in_Chrome) which dispatches via CDP.
